title: A HIGH SPEED ALGORITHM FOR 2D AND 3D PTV AND ITS APPLICATION
journal: Proceeding of Transport Phenomena in Thermal Engineering. Volume 2

paper_analysis.summary: The paper presents a high-speed algorithm for 2D and 3D particle tracking velocimetry (PTV) and demonstrates its application.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to present an algorithm and application example for 2D/3D particle tracking velocimetry, but no separate downloadable dataset or source data is indicated.

dataset_characterization.data_organization: No data availability statement was found, and no supplementary or source data files were identified on the publisher page beyond the main PDF article.
